summary: Audit cohérence globale post-Notion Stride-Up. 3 patches binarité parasite sur creative.schema (v1.1 → v1.2) : (A1) intent_mix multi-weighted {primary, secondary[], weights} qui remplace force-unicité de l'enum 6 valeurs, supporte créas hybrides DR+Brand 60/40 sans lossy collapse. (A2) overlay_density 0.0-1.0 continue + brand_mark_present bool orthogonaux qui découplent les 2 dimensions du craft_mode 3 valeurs. (A3) validation-state.json composite shared (status + confidence 0.0-1.0 orthogonal + confidence_source) référencé via oneOf sur creative.meta.validation_status, supporte tested @ 0.3 vs tested @ 0.85. Lexicon enrichi section Atlas 3 senses MECE (canon copy / vivant brand-spécifique / state modulator reporté D#390). Disclaimers atlas-canon-copy.md + 4 SKILL.md downstream Step 0bis. 3 skills reclassés taxonomy : cross-deepening-signals shared → orchestrator, validate-output-coherence shared → curator, encode-batch mode proposed → direct. Skills downstream patchés : decompose-ad 1.1.0 → 1.2.0, produce-paid-angles 1.2.0 → 1.3.0, produce-copy-brief 1.1.0 → 1.2.0, validate-resources alignment v1.2 oneOf accepted. Backward compat strict additif, deprecated aliases intent + craft_mode + validation_status string conservés 2 cycles minimum.
